zh.lifeSummary: 當William L Cartwright於1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿黑斯特時，他的父親Matthew Cartwright35歲，母親Teresia Sarah Miller30歲。他於1770年與Mary在美國馬里蘭州聖 馬也斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1770年住在英國爾南特維其。他去世於1828年在美國田納西州法也特沃倫享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William L Cartwright于1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿黑斯特时，他的父亲Matthew Cartwright35岁，母亲Teresia Sarah Miller30岁。他于1770年与Mary在美国马里兰州聖 馬也斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1770年住在英国爾南特維其。他去世于1828年在美国田纳西州法也特沃倫享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cartwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Gathright
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cartwright  .

variants.name: Cartright
meanings: Probably also a variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Courtright
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Kortrijk: habitational name from the city of Kortrijk in Flanders, in French known as Courtrai. Compare Cartwright , Cortright , Courtwright , Curtright , Cutright , and Kortright .
Perhaps also an altered form of English   Cartwright  .

History: The progenitors of the (majority of the) Courtrights (and Cortrights, Kortrights, etc.) were the brothers Jan and Michiel Bastiansen van Kortryk from Leerdam in the Netherlands, who arrived with their families to New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1663. The descendants of one or another brother also bear the surnames Kortright, Kortwright, Cortright, Co(u)rtwright, Cartwright, and Cu(r)tright.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Tennessee Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1796, Tennessee became the 16th state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Tennessee Secretart of State-From Territory to State

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: War of 1812
historicEvents.description: Because of the outbreak of war from Napoleonic France, Britain decided to blockade the trade between the United States and the French. The US then fought this action and said it was illegal under international law. Britain supplied Native Americans who raided settlers living on the frontier and halting expansion westward. In 1814, one of the British raids stormed into Washington D.C. burning down the capital. Neither the Americans or the British wanted to continue fighting, so negotiations of peace began. After Treaty of Ghent was signed, Unaware of the treaty, British forces invaded Louisiana but were defeated in January 1815.

en.lifeSummary: When William L Cartwright was born in 1750, in Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Matthew Cartwright, was 35 and his mother, Teresia Sarah Miller, was 30. He married Mary in 1770, in St. Mary's, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Nantwich, Cheshire, England in 1770. He died in 1828, in Warren, Fayette, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 78.

Il a épousé Mary en 1770, à St. Mary's, Maryland, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1770. Il est décédé en 1828, à Warren, Fayette, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시
ko.Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 아헤르스트
ko.lifeSummary: William L Cartwright(이)가 1750년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 아헤르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew Cartwright(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Teresia Sarah Miller(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1770년 미국 메릴랜드 주 스트. 마이'스에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1770년도에 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 살았다. 그는 1828년 미국 테네시 주 파예트 워르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William L Cartwright nasceu em 1750, em Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Matthew Cartwright, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Teresia Sarah Miller, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary em 1770, em St. Mary's, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1770. Ele faleceu em 1828, em Warren, Fayette, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William L Cartwright родился в 1750 г. в местности амхирст, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Matthew Cartwright было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Teresia Sarah Miller, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary в 1770 г. в местности ст. мэри'с, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия в 1770 году. Он умер в 1828 г. в местности варрен, феиетт, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.
